steps.title: Focus on data specificity
steps.content: The second team concluded that Novak and Kerrigan's study had more specificity in its data. In the database, more data specificity corresponds to a higher detail rating.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant ratings
steps.content: B concerns traceability, which measures procedure clarity rather than data specificity. C supports the conclusion by giving Novak and Kerrigan high detail. D supports the conclusion by giving Tanaka a low detail rating. A lower detail rating for Novak and Kerrigan would directly challenge the conclusion. The answer is A.
